data.title: 国际服韩推关注数突破10万
data.summary: Blue Archive's Official Twitter(KR) has hit 100K followers! Log in now to receive our sincerest gift
data.body:
Blue Archive's Official Twitter(KR) has hit 100K followers!

Log in now to receive our sincerest gift to celebrate this special occasion! ❤️

🎁Thank-You GIft: Pyroxene x1,200
🗓️Period: 11/17 (Fri) 7:00 AM ~ 11/24 (Fri) 2:59 PM (UTC)
